channel.title: Third Wave Water on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Third Wave Water on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Water for Espresso & Coffee: TDS, GH/KH, and the Best Bottled and Filtered Options
item.description: The complete water-for-espresso guide — TDS, GH, KH, the SCA Gold Cup target, bottled waters compared, filters that actually work, Third Wave Water, and RO remineralization.
